plan.title: Document Composer skill-porting rules for Warp-tuned workflows

narratives.Description: The Composer lessons include general guidance for translating Warp-oriented skills into Composer-friendly skills. This story captures that guidance as a reusable reference and updates the skill-authoring workflow so future skills include negative triggers, short-chat behavior, and fast-path versus isolation choices.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
1. Add the reference file references/composer-skill-porting.md with the Composer skill-porting rules distilled from the issue attachments, keeping it focused on reusable skill-authoring behavior.
2. Update the skills/deft-directive-write-skill/SKILL.md file and focused pytest content tests in tests/content/test_change_and_skills.py and tests/content/test_skill_frontmatter.py so the new reference and negative-trigger guidance are verified.
narratives.UserStory: As a Deft skill author, I want Composer-specific porting rules in the skill-writing workflow, so that Warp-tuned playbooks become short, discoverable, and machine-checkable Composer skills.
narratives.Traces: Issue #1518 attachments composer-vs-warp-skills.md and Composer Skills.txt; skills/deft-directive-write-skill/SKILL.md.

narrative.Acceptance: Given a contributor needs to port a Warp skill, when they read references/composer-skill-porting.md, then it explains thin SKILL.md files, references/ split, negative triggers, fast path versus isolation, and short chat expectations.

items.title: Skill writing workflow names Composer requirements

narrative.Acceptance: Given a new skill is drafted through deft-directive-write-skill, when the template and process are followed, then the generated skill guidance includes negative trigger guidance and reference-doc splitting for long templates.

items.title: Windows-safe GitHub body guidance is included

narrative.Acceptance: Given a skill creates or comments on GitHub issues, when the updated authoring guidance is followed, then it instructs authors to prefer body files over inline long shell strings on Windows-sensitive paths.
narrative.Traces: Issue #1518 Composer Skills shell notes; scm/github.md body-file rule.

items.title: Guidance is covered by focused content tests

narrative.Acceptance: Given content tests run for skill authoring guidance, then they fail if the Composer porting reference or negative trigger requirement disappears.

expected_outputs: content tests assert Composer skill-porting guidance and skill-authoring requirements
